name: PostHog
description: Monitor PostHog product analytics for user access and project configuration compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to PostHog → Settings → Personal API Keys
2. Click + Create personal API key
3. Select required scopes (organization:read)
4. Copy the key and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in PostHog → Settings → Personal API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists PostHog organization members and their access roles

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies PostHog projects are configured and active
